data.title: Global insurer Allianz's 2026 Risk Barometer finds Cyber as top business risk, with AI rapidly rising at #2.
data.description: In New York, according to global insurer Allianz Commercial's annual Allianz Risk Barometer, cyber incidents continue to be a major concern for companies worldwide in 2026, following a year of prominent headlines in 2025. The report highlights that artificial intelligence (AI) has experienced significant increased adoption throughout the past year, leading to its rise in the survey rankings to the second position as a complex source of operational, legal, and reputational risks for businesses. This reflects a growing awareness among companies of the challenges posed by AI technology.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary to headline Jarrett Supply Chain Summit in Cleveland on Aug. 6. Event returns after a year, highlighting O'Leary's role from Shark Tank. Midwest's premier supply chain event.
data.description: The Jarrett Supply Chain Summit is set to resume on August 6 in Cleveland, Ohio, after its previous success. The event will feature Kevin O'Leary, a renowned entrepreneur and investor famous for his appearance as a shark on ABC's "Shark Tank". Highlighted as the leading supply chain event in the Midwest, the summit is expected to attract industry professionals and experts. The event will take place in Cleveland, Ohio, providing a platform for networking and exchanging ideas.

data.title: Identity Theft Resource Center to unveil 20th Data Breach Report during Data Privacy Week 2026, emphasizing data privacy SAN DIEGO, Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: The latest ITRC Annual Data Breach Report complements the Data Privacy Week 2026 campaign aimed at educating businesses about optimal data collection methods that uphold data privacy and foster transparency. The report underscores the importance of safeguarding sensitive information and highlights key statistics. Released in San Diego on January 14, 2026, the report aims to emphasize the significance of data security practices within various industries.

data.title: Landstar will release Q4 2025 results on Jan 28, 2026, followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET. Full details on investor.landstar.com.
data.description: Jacksonville-based Landstar System, Inc. (NASDAQ:LSTR) revealed plans to disclose its fourth quarter results for 2025 after the market closes on January 28, 2026. Subsequently, a quarterly conference call with analysts and investors is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the performance of the fourth quarter. Interested parties can tune into the webcast by visiting investor.landstar.com, selecting "Webcasts," and then opting for "Landstar's Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release Conference Call."

data.title: Goldman Sachs to report Q4 earnings of $11.57 per share with revenue estimate of $14.11 billion. Stock price target raised to $775.
data.description: Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE: GS) is set to announce fourth-quarter earnings on Thursday, Jan. 15. Analysts predict earnings of $11.57 per share, a decrease from $11.95 per share a year ago. The consensus revenue estimate for the quarter is $14.11 billion, up from $13.87 billion last year. JPMorgan analyst Kian Abouhossein, on Jan. 8, maintained a Neutral rating on Goldman Sachs and raised the price target to $775 from $750. The company's annual dividend yield is of interest to investors amidst the recent attention on Goldman Sachs. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Beam Global (NASDAQ: BEEM) stock surged on Wednesday due to announcement of Q4 revenue growth over 50%, strongest since Q3 2024, driven by new products and international expansion.
data.description: Beam Global (NASDAQ: BEEM) stock saw a notable increase on Wednesday after an announcement on Tuesday highlighted significant fourth-quarter revenue growth. This rise occurred despite a decline in the broader market, with the S&P 500 decreasing by 0.44% and the Nasdaq dropping by 0.66% the day before. This indicates that BEEM's surge is mainly due to company-specific developments. The preliminary reports suggest that Beam Global's fourth-quarter revenue for 2025 surged by over 50% compared to the previous quarter, marking the company's strongest quarterly performance since Q3 2024. This growth is attributed to new product launches, expansion of international operations, and higher sales to commercial clients. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FourKites starts Manufacturing Customer Advisory Board with Fortune 500 execs to boost supply chain AI development.
data.description: Chicago-based company FourKites has recently announced the establishment of a Manufacturing Customer Advisory Board in collaboration with executives from Fortune 500 companies. The initiative aims to spearhead innovation in AI technology for supply chain management. This board will consist of prominent figures from the manufacturing industry, providing strategic insights and expertise to enhance supply chain operations. With this development, FourKites is set to leverage the knowledge and experience of top-tier executives to drive forward advancements in supply chain AI.

data.title: AVAX price aims for $16.50 by February as Avalanche gains bullish momentum at $14.53. RSI neutral at 60.32. MACD bullish.
data.description: The Avalanche market is displaying a strong upward trend, currently priced at $14.53. Analysts are eyeing a potential increase to the range of $15.50-$16.50. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a neutral 60.32, indicating a balanced market sentiment. The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator is bullish, suggesting further price gains. Additionally, the market is testing resistance at the upper Bollinger band.

data.title: Cizzle Brands partners with USA Lacrosse making CWENCH Hydration official sports drink; HappiEats Sport Pasta also recognized.
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) has signed an agreement with USA Lacrosse, making CWENCH Hydration the exclusive Official Sports Drink of USA Lacrosse and the U.S. National teams. This deal includes HappiEats Sport Pasta as the exclusive official fortified pasta. Noted as the governing body for lacrosse in the United States, this partnership will see CWENCH Hydration being recognized by USA Lacrosse as their official sports drink.

data.title: Hundreds to join Governor Mike Kehoe and Treasurer Vivek Malek at Capitol celebration in Jefferson City for School Choice Week.
data.description: Students, teachers, and parents will come together to commemorate the different educational choices available during School Choice Week in Jefferson City, Missouri. The event, scheduled for January 14, 2026, will see Governor Mike Kehoe and Treasurer Vivek Malek in attendance, along with hundreds of participants. The celebration aims to highlight the importance of diverse educational opportunities for approximately $(specified number) students across the state.

data.title: Callan's 2025 fee study reveals fees institutional investors pay for asset management, 11th annual report.
data.description: In San Francisco on January 14, 2026, Callan, a prominent institutional investment consulting firm, released its 2025 Investment Management Fee Study. This marks the 11th edition of the study, which focuses on the fees paid by institutional investors for asset management services. The report offers a comprehensive analysis of the fees involved in asset management, shedding light on the costs borne by investors.

data.title: Jacobs secures contracts with City of Suffolk, Virginia to modernize water infrastructure and meet rising demand.
data.description: In a move to address increasing demands and adhere to environmental standards, Jacobs (NYSE: J) has recently been awarded two engineering and program management contracts by the City of Suffolk, Virginia. The projects are set to integrate advanced technologies and boost capacity. This initiative comes amidst a rising demand for services. The contracts signify a significant step towards the modernization and expansion of infrastructure in Suffolk, with an aim to enhance operational efficiency and environmental compliance.

data.title: Price prediction for DOT: Targets $2.48 resistance by January end. Short-term goal $2.48, medium-term $2.12-$2.65. Support at $2.12.
data.description: Predictions for the price of DOT in the short term suggest a target of $2.48 within the next week, while medium-term forecasts for the next month indicate a range between $2.12 and $2.65. The bullish breakout level is estimated to be at $2.48, with critical support at $2.12.

data.title: Bitcoin trades near $95,000 with ETF inflows; Ethereum at $3,293, XRP at $2.12. Bitcoin ETFs see $753.7M inflows, Ethereum ETFs report $130M inflows. Market sentiment at 52.
data.description: Bitcoin was trading close to $95,000 as the market sentiment reached a neutral level of 52. Bitcoin ETFs experienced a total of $753.7 million in net inflows, while Ethereum ETFs received $130 million in net inflows. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $95,083, Ethereum (ETH) at $3,293, Solana (SOL) at $144.25, and XRP at $2.12. Despite fluctuations, Bitcoin has historically remained above its valuation model, with notable exceptions near the $15,000 cycle low. For more details, visit the full story on the website.
